tasks.name: p2-typebox-shim
tasks.notes: Replaced dynamic try/catch import of @sinclair/typebox with direct static import. Also fixed same pattern for @mariozechner/pi-tui (Key import). Removed stale comments about shims. All 509 tests pass.

tasks.name: p3-error-content-not-found
tasks.notes: Changed workflow-not-found path from returning content with error text to throwing an Error. The LLM framework now sees a tool failure instead of a silent success.

tasks.name: p3-error-content-catch
tasks.notes: Removed try/catch around executeWorkflow that was masking failures as successful content. Errors now propagate so the LLM framework treats them as tool failures.

decisions.decision: Remove the try/catch entirely rather than re-throwing with a modified message
decisions.rationale: The original catch was adding an input schema hint to the error message, but this is better handled by the framework or the workflow executor itself. Keeping the error unmodified preserves the original stack trace and error context.

tasks.name: p8-hasui-list-select
tasks.notes: Added ctx.hasUI guard before ctx.ui.select() in handleList (line ~61). Returns early with notification in non-interactive mode.

tasks.name: p8-hasui-list-input
tasks.notes: Added ctx.hasUI guard before ctx.ui.input() in handleList input prompt loop (line ~86). Returns early with notification in non-interactive mode.

tasks.name: p8-hasui-run-select
tasks.notes: Added ctx.hasUI guard before ctx.ui.select() in handleRun resume prompt. Non-interactive mode auto-resumes the incomplete run.

tasks.name: p8-hasui-resume-select
tasks.notes: Added ctx.hasUI guard before ctx.ui.select() in handleResume. Non-interactive mode auto-resumes without confirmation.

decisions.decision: Auto-resume incomplete runs in non-interactive mode instead of failing
decisions.rationale: In handleRun and handleResume, the select() prompts ask whether to resume. In non-interactive mode, auto-resuming is the safer default since the user explicitly invoked run/resume. For handleList, we return early since interactive selection is fundamental to its purpose.

tasks.name: p1-type-any-typebox
tasks.notes: Already fixed. src/index.ts line 10 has `import { Type } from "@sinclair/typebox";` — no `let Type: any` pattern exists. Verified with grep and all 509 tests pass.

issues.description: Finding p1-type-any-typebox was already resolved: src/index.ts correctly imports Type from @sinclair/typebox with no `let Type: any` present.

tasks.name: p1-type-any-params: Replace all `any` parameter types in src/index.ts
tasks.notes: Replaced `ctx: any` with `ExtensionContext` or `ExtensionCommandContext`, `pi: any` with `ExtensionAPI`, `params: any` with typed object, `onUpdate: any` with `AgentToolUpdateCallback | undefined`. Imported all types from @mariozechner/pi-coding-agent. All 509 tests pass.

decisions.decision: Use ExtensionCommandContext for command handlers (handleList, handleRun, handleResume, /workflow handler) and ExtensionContext for tool execute and shortcut handlers
decisions.rationale: ExtensionCommandContext extends ExtensionContext with waitForIdle() and is the type expected by RegisteredCommand.handler. Tool execute and shortcut handlers receive ExtensionContext per the pi SDK type definitions.

decisions.decision: Used inline object type `{ workflow: string; input?: unknown; fresh?: string }` for execute params instead of Static<typeof schema>
decisions.rationale: The parameter schema uses Type.Optional(Type.Unknown()) for input which makes Static inference awkward. Inline type matches the actual shape and is clearer.

tasks.name: p4-unused-onupdate
tasks.notes: Renamed onUpdate to _onUpdate at line 297 in the execute signature. All 509 tests pass.

tasks.name: p7-format-tool-result-unbounded
tasks.notes: Added truncateTail (from pi-coding-agent) to completion message content before sendMessage. Limits to 50KB / 2000 lines with a truncation notice appending the run dir path for full output. Import added at top of file.

decisions.decision: Truncate in workflow-executor.ts at the sendMessage call site rather than in formatResult or index.ts
decisions.rationale: The sendMessage path in workflow-executor.ts is the unbounded path identified in the finding. formatToolResult in index.ts is already a compact one-liner summary. Truncating at sendMessage covers both the formatResult and resolveCompletion code paths.

decisions.decision: Use 50KB / 2000 lines matching pi built-in limits
decisions.rationale: P7 conformance reference specifies 50KB / 2000 lines as the built-in limit. Using truncateTail from pi-coding-agent as required by P7.1.

tasks.name: p10-jsdoc-header
tasks.notes: Added /** ... */ JSDoc file header describing the extension entry point. Used the same style as all other source files (plain block comment, no @fileoverview tag).
